response.overview: This film presents an atmospheric and suspenseful narrative. Given the current progress (17:46), the film has established its tense tone through specific sound design, including tracks like Alapaap by Eraserheads and various building sound effects
response.tagline: This is a suspense-thriller short film project created by students from the Bachelor of Multimedia Arts (BMMA) 203. The film utilizes various musical elements and sound effects to build tension throughout the scenes.
response.title: CINCO DE MAYO | Short Film
